name: quality-review
description: Single-skill code review focused on code quality and craft, not correctness — readability and vertical openness, given/when/then test structure, Clean Code stepdown ordering, OOP/functional style consistency, pointless barrel exports, unnecessary type casts, and over-complicated code that collapses into one parameterized function. Reviews the current branch diff by default (or explicit paths), with calibration against common false positives.
